[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000110 3
1 010011100 4
2 000110000 2
3 001001100 3
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 010011100 4
7 000110000 2

01 10 000010000 1
12 21 000010000 1
23 32 011000000 2
34 43 011100010 4

56 65 110010000 3
67 76 001000000 1
70 07 001001100 3 match 3

02 20 011011100 5
13 31 000100000 1
24 42 011010100 4
35 53 010000010 2
46 64 111110001 6
57 75 000001110 3
60 06 011010001 4
71 17 000000000 a match 4 5

03 30 011000000 2
14 41 000110000 2 match 2 7
25 52 010011100 4 match 1 6
36 63 011100000 3
47 74 001000110 3 match 0
50 05 010011100 4 match 1 6
61 16 000110000 2 match 2 7
72 27 001001100 3 match 3

15 51 000010000 1
